art_market.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 (March 27-29) is underway, highlighting a shift in the market toward long-term collecting over short-term speculation.
top_stories: Art Basel Hong Kong 2026 opened at HKCEC with 240 galleries.
Market recalibration: Shift away from 'speculative flipping' toward long-term value.
Global art auction turnover grew 12% in H2 2025; US market remains dominant.
Artprice/ArtTactic report warns against short-term resales (avg. 5.7% annual loss).

stock_market.summary: Amazon (AMZN) remains a focus for analysts, with strong AWS momentum despite concerns over $200B capital expenditure plans.
key_factors: Amazon (AMZN): Strong Buy ratings (TD Cowen target $300); focus on AWS GenAI growth.
Capital Expenditure: Concerns over Amazon's $200B investment cycle vs. AI infrastructure strategy.
NVIDIA/AWS: Reports of 1 million GPUs to be delivered to AWS by 2027.
Market Sentiment: Cautious amid broad tech volatility ahead of Q1 2026 earnings season.
